India ka sabse detailed

Embroidery GST — Important Clarification: CBEC (Government of India) ne officially clarify kiya hai ki embroidered saree pe 5% GST lagta hai — chahe kitni bhi embroidery ho. Saree fabric hi maani jaati hai. 18% sirf tab lagta hai jab embroidery ya zari alag article ke roop mein (strip, motif) becha jaaye — saree ke saath nahi.

Aksar Pooche Jaate Sawaal
Textile GST ke baare mein common questions
Saree pe 5% GST lagta hai ya 12%? +
Saree pe 5% GST lagta hai (HSN code 5007 ya 5208). Handloom saree pe 0% GST hota hai. Agar saree pe heavy embroidery ya zari work hai (jaise Banarasi embroidered), toh embroidery portion pe 18% lag sakta hai — lekin plain silk Banarasi pe 5% hi lagta hai.
CGST aur SGST kab lagta hai, IGST kab? +
Jab buyer aur seller ek hi state mein hote hain (intra-state sale), toh CGST + SGST lagta hai — dono barabar split hote hain. Jab alag-alag states mein ho (inter-state sale, jaise Surat se Delhi), toh sirf IGST lagta hai. IGST = CGST + SGST ka total.
Readymade garment pe GST kitna lagta hai? +
Readymade garments pe value ke hisaab se GST rate alag hota hai. ₹1000 ya usse kam price wale garments pe 5% GST lagta hai. ₹1000 se zyada price wale garments pe 12% GST lagta hai. Yeh MRP ke hisaab se decide hota hai, cost ke hisaab se nahi.
Handloom products pe GST kya hai? +
Pure handloom fabric aur sarees pe 0% GST hota hai — inka GST Nil hai. Lekin iske liye product genuinely handloom certified hona chahiye. Power-loom pe bane products handloom nahi maane jaate, unpe 5% GST lagta hai.
HSN code kya hota hai aur kyun zaroori hai? +
HSN (Harmonized System of Nomenclature) code ek internationally standardized product classification number hai. India mein GST invoice mein HSN code dalna zaroori hai. ₹5 crore se zyada turnover wale businesses ko 6-digit HSN, usse kam ko 4-digit HSN dena hota hai. Sahi HSN se sahi GST rate automatically confirm hota hai.
ITC (Input Tax Credit) textile pe milta hai? +
Haan — agar aap GST registered dealer hain, toh aap purchase pe pay kiye GST ka ITC claim kar sakte hain against aapke collected GST se. Handloom products (0% GST) pe ITC nahi milta. Regular fabric purchases pe aap apne purchases ki CGST/SGST ITC claim kar sakte hain.
